title: Dense Uruguayan Brussels Sprouts Wrap
description: A sour and dense Uruguayan dish featuring Brussels sprouts, infused oil, and raw friendly ingredients, served in a pandan leaf wrap to help cure hangovers.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the halved Brussels sprouts to the skillet and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked Brussels sprouts to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
Lay a pandan leaf flat on a work surface and arrange a quarter of the Brussels sprouts mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the pandan leaf over the filling to form a wrap, and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Serve the wraps immediately, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
